creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)
@antoine 

This updated patch includes a backport from upstream that should also fix opentoonz:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-Qt-Update-Qt5-to-5.15.9.patch.v2

Could you take it for another run?

mfg Tobias
